skillManagement.deleteContent: After deletion, related configurations and data of this skill will be cleared, and it can no longer be called by digital humans. Please proceed with caution.
skillManagement.searchEmpty: Sorry, no related content was found
skillManagement.emptySubDesc: There are currently no available skills. You can import one or create one via chat.
